p.strong: Non-contiguous blocks linked via intrusive pointers

div.p: Free List Traversal: 0x1000 → 0x5030 → 0x1050 → 0x5050 → 0x1030 → 0x5060 → 0x1040 → 0x5070 → 0x1070 → NULL Blocks from any chunk coexist on the same linked list. No special handling required.

text.tspan: // Intrusive free list node stored IN the free block

g.text: return block; // Caller gets Chunk 1 block

text.tspan: // Intrusive free list node stored IN the free block
